items.headline: Atlassian slashes 10% of workforce to 'self-fund' investments in AI and enterprise sales
items.summary: Atlassian said it's cutting 10% of its workforce, or about 1,600 jobs, as it restructures to fund investments in artificial intelligence and enterprise sales.
